title: catevala subulata
intro: Catevala subulata, also known as the desert broom plant, is a type of flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi, making it a potential treatment for wound healing and skin infections. The health benefits of Catevala subulata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Catevala subulata can be prepared into herbal teas, salves, and tinctures, which can be used to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and soothe skin irritations.
